desc: LayoutApplyPendingPlacementsToRevitCommand — commit a staged placement batch to the Revit model.
summary: LayoutApplyPendingPlacementsToRevitCommand — commit a staged placement batch to the Revit model.
postcondition: FamilyInstances created inside one Transaction; change transitioned to 'applied'.
logictree:
1) Resolver_ChangeId required.
2) Load pending_placements for the change.
3) For each placement: resolve FamilySymbol (unique id first, then name fallback).
4) Open Transaction. Activate symbol if not active. Call NewFamilyInstance. Record per-placement outcome.
5) Commit; transition change to 'applied'. On no successes, roll back + mark 'rejected'.
